service: my-serverless-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  stage: dev
  region: us-east-1
  
  # Khai báo biến môi trường cho tất cả các hàm Lambda tại đây
  environment:
    DB_HOST: ${env:DB_HOST}
    DB_PORT: ${env:DB_PORT}
    DB_USER: ${env:DB_USER}
    DB_PASSWORD: ${env:DB_PASSWORD}
    DB_NAME: ${env:DB_NAME}

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  hello:
    handler: src/handlers/hello.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: hello
          method: get

  createUser:
    handler: src/handlers/user.create
    events:
      - http:
          path: users
          method: post

  getUsers:
    handler: src/handlers/user.getAll
    events:
      - http:
          path: users
          method: get
